name: kolex
description: Get paid for waiting. Kolex is a Chrome extension that replaces the loading indicators on ChatGPT and Claude with one sponsored status line — 50% of ad revenue goes to you.

scripts.build:demo: npm run typecheck && KOLEX_DEMO=1 node scripts/build.mjs
scripts.test:server: node --test test/server.test.mjs test/auth.test.mjs test/adversarial.test.mjs test/ratelimit.test.mjs test/persistence.test.mjs test/abuse.test.mjs test/payout-halt.test.mjs test/campaign-maturation.test.mjs test/bonus-unlock.test.mjs test/bonus-cap.test.mjs test/bonus-scarcity.test.mjs test/db-diff.test.mjs
scripts.test:ext: npm run build && xvfb-run -a node test/extension-e2e.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:server && npm run test:web && npm run test:browser && npm run test:ext
scripts.package: npm run build && cd extension && zip -qr ../kolex-extension.zip .
